analyst_briefing: All 10 conflicts remain Contested (week_count=1, null indicator_medians), blocking deviation scoring—core analytical unit unavailable. Trajectory downgrades warranted for 5 'Escalating' conflicts (Sudan, Myanmar, Haiti, DRC, Russia-Ukraine) to Stable per weekly theatre status showing no sustained signals beyond initial seeding. US-Israel-Iran and Israel-Lebanon sustain Escalating trajectories via daily I1/I2 findings (Houthi Red Sea threats, Lebanon strikes) despite null baselines. No largest positive deviations identifiable (null medians); habituation risk low at week 1. F4 flags maintained on premature de-escalation signals (Gaza I5, DRC I5, Iran I5/I2); no F4 removals or new F1 atrocity flags. No baselines near lock (all <13 weeks). Roster: monitor Ethiopia for inclusion (partial I2). Cross-flags to GMM (Iran Red Sea I4 economic risk, HIGH urgency). Deviation-over-level principle holds: absent baselines, initial high levels (e.g., Iran 5x indicators RED-band) are structural, not anomalous spikes—early-warning product null this cycle.
